'''ngaraba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iamatology|iamatology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-r-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iamatology|iamatology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngaraba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæræbæth|ngæræbæth]] || [[word:ngæræbæj|ngæræbæj]] || [[word:ngæræbæsh|ngæræbæsh]] || [[word:ngæræbæ|ngæræbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngararabath|ngararabath]] || [[word:ngararabaj|ngararabaj]] || [[word:ngararabash|ngararabash]] || [[word:ngararaba|ngararaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngarabath|ngarabath]] || [[word:ngarabaj|ngarabaj]] || [[word:ngarabash|ngarabash]] || [[word:ngaraba|ngaraba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngarafbath|ngarafbath]] || [[word:ngarafbaj|ngarafbaj]] || [[word:ngarafbash|ngarafbash]] || [[word:ngarafbaf|ngarafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngarabatha|ngarabatha]] || [[word:ngarabaja|ngarabaja]] || [[word:ngarabasha|ngarabasha]] || [[word:ngarabaka|ngarabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngarabath|ngarabath]] || [[word:ngarabaj|ngarabaj]] || [[word:ngarabash|ngarabash]] || [[word:ngaraba|ngaraba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngarabathal|ngarabathal]] || [[word:ngarabajal|ngarabajal]] || [[word:ngarabashal|ngarabashal]] || [[word:ngarabakal|ngarabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngarabathatha|ngarabathatha]] || [[word:ngarabajaja|ngarabajaja]] || [[word:ngarabashasha|ngarabashasha]] || [[word:ngarabaka|ngarabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngarabathan|ngarabathan]] || [[word:ngarabajan|ngarabajan]] || [[word:ngarabashan|ngarabashan]] || [[word:ngarabakan|ngarabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngarabathaoro|ngarabathaoro]] || [[word:ngarabajaoro|ngarabajaoro]] || [[word:ngarabashaoro|ngarabashaoro]] || [[word:ngarabakaoro|ngarabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
